series_metadata.series_title: License Applications for Dealers and, Liveries
series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains documents generally associated with the license applications submitted by boat dealers and liveries to the Division of Parks and Watercraft, including by not limited to: license applications, documents supporting the applications, and a log of license numbers.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 2 years after being created or 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor, whichever is later, then delete. ; Paper: Retain for 2 years after being created or 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor, whichever is later, unless paper records are converted and saved in an electronic format. After these documents are saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be shredded., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
